zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Poultney於大約1318年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，他的父親William de Poultney28歲，母親Mrs. Ellen De Poultney24歲。他於大約1348年與Cicely Poutrell of Wysall在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾維薩爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Poultney于大约1318年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓时，他的父亲William de Poultney28岁，母亲Mrs. Ellen De Poultney24岁。他于大约1348年与Cicely Poutrell of Wysall在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾維薩爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1385年在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Poultney was born about 1318, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Poultney, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, was 24. He married Cicely Poutrell of Wysall about 1348, in Wysall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1385, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Poultney est né environ 1318, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Poultney, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Cicely Poutrell of Wysall environ 1348, à Wysall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1385, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Poultney um 1318 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Poultney 28 und seine Mutter Mrs. Ellen De Poultney 24. Er hat um 1348 in Wysall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Cicely Poutrell of Wysall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Poultney è nato il circa 1318 nel Misterton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Poultney, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Cicely Poutrell of Wysall circa 1348, nel Wysall, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1385, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Poultneyが約1318年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで生まれた時，父William de Poultneyは28歳，母Mrs. Ellen De Poultneyは24歳であった。約1348年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウイサルでCicely Poutrell of Wysallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Poultney(이)가 대략 1318년 영국 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Poultney(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Ellen De Poultney(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 윈이사에서 Cicely Poutrell of Wysall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Poultney nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Poultney, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely Poutrell of Wysall aproximadamente 1348, em Wysall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1385, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Poultney родился около 1318 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Poultney было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely Poutrell of Wysall около 1348 г. в местности висалл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1385 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Poultney nació aproximadamente 1318, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Poultney, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ellen De Poultney, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Cicely Poutrell of Wysall aproximadamente 1348, en Wysall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1385, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
